name: gimp-image-select-rectangle
blurb: Select a rectangle on the specified image.
embedding_text:
gimp image select rectangle
Select a rectangle on the specified image.

name: gimp-context-set-foreground
blurb: Set the current GIMP foreground color.
embedding_text:
gimp context set foreground
Set the current GIMP foreground color.

name: gimp-image-flatten
blurb: Flatten all visible layers into a single layer.
embedding_text:
gimp image flatten
Flatten all visible layers into a single layer.

name: gimp-layer-new
embedding_text:
gimp layer new
Create a new layer.

name: gimp-image-resize
embedding_text:
gimp image resize
Resize the image's canvas.
